summary: We applied your May 14, 2026 card payment of $313.75 to your Spring 2026 enrollments for Chaska and Easton Carbonell. That payment had not been linked to your account correctly, which caused your balance to look higher than it should.
We also cleared the remaining $130 Winter 2026 balance on Easton's enrollment — that amount is no longer owed.
We added a $90 sibling discount credit to your account. This credit will automatically apply when you pay online, reducing what you are charged by card.

Your current Spring 2026 balance is $766.25 before credits ($383.12 for Chaska and $383.13 for Easton). After your $90 sibling discount credit is applied at checkout, your estimated card charge will be about $676.25.
